title: eleocharis torticulmis
intro: Eleocharis torticulmis, also known as the rough-leaved spikerush, is a type of perennial aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, Eleocharis torticulmis has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its volatile oil and saponin content. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including the treatment of skin conditions, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. Eleocharis torticulmis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used as a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
